step_rationale: Cardioprotective factor limiting ischemia-reperfusion injury and myocardial damage after coronary occlusion.
mechanism: BRD2 suppresses ischemia-reperfusion injury and cardiomyocyte death, reducing myocardial infarction severity.

references.title: BRD2 protects the rat H9C2 cardiomyocytes from hypoxia‑reoxygenation injury by targeting Nrf2/HO‑1 signaling pathway.
